criteria.criterionText: Then it should use only portable ASCII characters
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The `report.md` content, necessary to verify the use of portable ASCII characters in method drill-down, was not provided.

criteria.criterionText: And it should fit in Markdown without relying on color or terminal-specific rendering
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The `report.md` content, necessary to verify Markdown compatibility and absence of terminal-specific rendering, was not provided.

criteria.criterionText: And long method names should wrap or be summarized without hiding the full method name from the detailed appendix
criteria.llmObservationSummary: The `report.md` content, necessary to verify the handling of long method names and their presence in an appendix, was not provided.

criteria.criterionText: And HTML visual QA should verify that method call branches remain readable.
criteria.llmObservationSummary: This criterion explicitly requires 'HTML visual QA', which is not an assigned end-user surface (feature markdown review, generated report review, CLI evidence review). The `report.md` content was also not provided, which might have contained some textual representation, but visual HTML inspection is explicitly requested and not available.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Either provide access to HTML visual output or rephrase the criterion to be testable via markdown/report review.
